benefits.title: Key points
items: Makes it possible to handle electrical work and automation in the same enquiry.
Provides a useful technical line for homes or businesses depending on the need.
Also includes the solar PV and energy advice already present on the current website.

process.title: Service process
items: You explain the electrical or automation need.
The solution that best fits the installation is reviewed.
The technical work or installation is coordinated.
The enquiry can be expanded if other service lines are involved.

items.question: What does this service cover?
items.answer: The current website groups electrical installations, home automation, solar photovoltaic systems and energy advice within the same service line.

items.question: Is this only for residential projects?
items.answer: No. The current presentation positions it for homes or businesses depending on the type of installation.

items.question: Can this enquiry be combined with other technical needs?
items.answer: Yes. The current structure links this line with climate control, water systems and security whenever the case requires it.
